title: Victorian Gewgaws
description: Various new vanilla compatible enchantments, abilities, etc
body:
# Victorian Gewgaws
Victorian Gewgaws adds arious new vanilla compatible enchantments, abilities, ect. There is no central theme so literally anything I feel like adding will be in this mod.


## Current features
- Night Vision enchantment
  - A helmet treasure enchantment that gives the player Night Vision for 30 seconds (continuous if worn). This enchantment conflicts with Aqua Affinity and Respiration.

## Planned features
- Double jump enchantment
- Lootable structures
- and many others...

## Modpacks
Feel free to add this to your pack, no permission required.
